c: CUHK format: PDF via Blackboard; filename: STUDENTID_COURSECODE_ASS#.pdf
Large DataFrames (>1M rows): vectorized ops, avoid apply(), numba for custom aggregations
Feature branch: from main, PR, squash merge; never force-push main
API retry: exp backoff 1→2→4→8s, max 4 retries, jitter ±20%; 429→immediate backoff
LaTeX: use \input{} not \include{} (no page break); hyperref must be last package
LaTeX 'undefined control sequence': missing package or typo; check log line number
Claude Code: give file+line, state what NOT to change, prefer Edit over Write
Debug: reproduce→isolate→hypothesize→test ONE change→verify. Never change two things at once
jsonschema: draft7, $defs for reusable types, additionalProperties:false for strict mode
Bash: set -euo pipefail; quote all vars; [[ ]] not [ ]; trap EXIT for cleanup
HMS IC window: rolling 252d; shorter=noisy, longer=misses regime shifts. Spearman rank, forward 1-period.
TWAP 30min for positions >0.5% ADV to minimize market impact; slippage ~5bps/side
Data: Wind (CN equities), Bloomberg (cross-asset FX), internal HDF5 tick DB via h5py
Risk controls: max pos 3%, sector cap 15%, turnover penalty 0.003/unit
Momentum: 12-1 month returns (skip last month) — Jegadeesh-Titman; raw returns not risk-adj
Signal blend: IC-weighted equal-weight; recalibrate quarterly; expanding window IC not rolling
Universe: CSI 500+CSI 300, exclude ST, min 60d history, min float 500M CNY
Autoresearch: launchd 08:30 HKT daily → factor report + signal update
Risk model: Barra-style, 10 style factors + industry dummies; estimation=all A-shares
Rebalance: weekly Friday close; daily signal update; min 1% turnover to trade
IC > 0.05 → live-tradeable; IC > 0.08 → strong; decay half-life < 5d → discard (too noisy)
NLP sentiment: SnowNLP (CN), BERT-base-chinese; news from Tushare + Wind news API. IC ~0.03
○ OPEN: Options flow as HMS alpha signal. No conclusion yet.
FIXED: Lookahead bias — factor neutralization used full-sample mean; fixed→expanding window mean
Blackboard MCP: shared state for multi-agent; keys namespaced by project; TTL 24h default
Deep Research MCP: Firecrawl+Claude synthesis; max 20 pages/query; outputs structured JSON
OpenClaude: Claude Code + MCP + Edge TTS + WhatsApp. Loop: message→classify→route→respond
Keyed queue: one slot per sender; newer overwrites pending — prevents buildup during busy periods
Dual timeout: 30s tool-call (hard), 90s total (soft); escalates to fallback text reply
Crash recovery: supervisor, 5s backoff, max 3 restarts/hour to prevent thrash
○ OPEN: Calendar/email integration. WhatsApp→'my calendar'→Google Cal. Pending API setup.
ERR: skill quant-research health=0.27<0.60 | evolve with FIX mode
ERR: skill auto-improve health=0.80<0.80 | evolve with FIX mode
ERR: skill memory-system health=0.72<0.80 | evolve with FIX mode
IGSL v2 health: EMA α=0.1; formula=applied×completion×(1-0.5×fallback); alert threshold 0.60
Memory half-lives: DEC=∞, PAT=30d, ARCH=60d, ART=14d, LOOP=∞, GEN=90d, ERR=180d
Token budget: T0(80)+T1(50)+Index(50)+Hard(460)=640 always; soft skills load on keyword match
EvoGraph: FIX/DERIVED/CAPTURED modes; parent→child with session_id+trigger+delta summary
○ OPEN: Semantic embedding search for skills via all-MiniLM-L6-v2. Not yet implemented.
Hook chain: session_start_v2.sh→additionalContext; health_recorder.py per-tool; retro on Stop
5 bridges: skill-applied, memory-to-skills, health-sync, session-context, post-session
